# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure resources that use service endpoints for connectivity. Enable service endpoints for Storage and SQL on our VNet but allow public access as fallback. This provides flexibility for accessing resources from both Azure and on-premises during migration.

Prevent cloud network security.
# Category: cloud_network_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "vnetName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string"
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "vnetResourceGroup": "[resourceGroup().name]",
    "subscriptionId": "[subscription().subscriptionId]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets",
      "apiVersion": "2019-04-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('vnetName'), '/default')]",
      "properties": {
        "serviceEndpoints": [
          {
            "service": "Microsoft.Storage"
          },
          {
            "service": "Microsoft.Sql"
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets",
      "apiVersion": "2019-04-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('vnetName'), '/gatewaySubnet')]",
      "properties": {
        "serviceEndpoints": [
          {
            "service": "Microsoft.Storage"
          },
          {
            "service": "Microsoft.Sql"
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets",
      "apiVersion": "2019-04-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('vnetName'), '/onpremSubnet')]",
      "properties": {
        "serviceEndpoints": [
          {
            "service": "Microsoft.Storage"
          },
          {
            "service": "Microsoft.Sql"
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks",
      "apiVersion": "2019-04-01",
      "name": "[parameters('vnetName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "properties": {
        "addressSpace": {
          "addressPrefixes": [
            "10.0.0.0/16"
          ]
        },
        "subnets": [
          {
            "name": "default",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "10.0.1.0/24",
              "serviceEndpoints": [
                {
                  "service": "Microsoft.Storage"
                },
                {
                  "service": "Microsoft.Sql"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "gatewaySubnet",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "10.0.2.0/24",
              "serviceEndpoints": [
                {
                  "service": "Microsoft.Storage"
                },
                {
                  "service": "Microsoft.Sql"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "onpremSubnet",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "10.0.3.0/24",
              "serviceEndpoints": [
                {
                  "service": "Microsoft.Storage"
                },
                {
                  "service": "Microsoft.Sql"
                }
              ]
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2019-06-01",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_LRS"
      },
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "properties": {
        "networkAcls": {
          "defaultAction": "Allow",
          "bypass": "AzureServices",
          "ipRules": [
            {
              "action": "Allow",
              "value": "10.0.1.0/24"
            },
            {
              "action": "Allow",
              "value": "10.0.3.0/24"
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2018-06-01-preview",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "S0"
      },
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), 'Admin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('sqlServerPassword')]"
      }
    }
  ]
}
